titleStmt.title: SII 34.318: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 318. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north and west walls of the Bṛihadamba shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Achyutadēva-Mahārāya, Śaka 1452, Vikṛiti, Arpisi 1 = A.D. 1530, October 1.

The nāṭṭavar of Valla-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu assigned some dēvadāna lands as kāṇiyāṭchi to Chokkaṉār Pallavarāyar of Viraiyāchchilai, a paḍaipaṟṟu village in Kāṉa-nāḍu alias Virudarāja-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu. The nāṭṭavar confirmed the kāṇiyāṭchi right in the land to the latter's son too, with the stipulation that he should measure out the agreed share (vāram) of the produce to the temple of Araṅguḷanāthar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīmaṉ makāmaṇṭalīcuraṉ Ariaravipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappa mūvarāyirakaṇṭan śrī Accanta tEvamakārāyar tiruvirācci
yampaṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 5 10 2 ṉmēl cellāniṉṟa vikiṟuti varuṣam Aṟpaci 10 2 kāṉanāṭāṉa virutarācapayaṅkaravaḷa
nāṭṭu kāṉaṉāṭṭu paṭaippaṟṟu viraiyāccilai cokkaṉār pallavarāyaṟku Irāca Irācavaḷanāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu nāṭāka Amainta nāṭṭa
var Ikkāṇiāṇmai piṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi tampirāṉār Araṉkuḷanātar tēvatāṉam kiḷippayiṟṟū nāṭṭu kaḷaṅkuṭivayalil
mēṟpaṭi kuḷattup periya miṭaiyālum nīrpāntu viḷaiyum mēlaippallavan taṭi 1- lum kīḻai ṉāṟṟaṅkālum Uḷppaṭa nila
tuvum teṟkkil pallavaṉ taṭi 4l 5 10 3 Ituvum Aṇukkan vayaṟkkal ta ṭi3 l nilam 10 Āka nilam 7 māvum kāṇi
āṇmai Āka kuṭuttapaṭiyālē Inta ṉilattukku kīḻnōkkiya kiṇaṟum mēl nōkkiyamaramum ṉīrum cēṟum pācipāṭṭa
mum maṟṟum Eṟppiyaṟpaṭṭa cuvantiramum Aṉupavitta kuṭuttapaṭiyālē Ivar makan kuḷata pallavarāyarāmāṇikka
m makaṉ maṇavāḷaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭāṟku(ṟa) Avar kāṇi Āṭcci Āka kuṭuttapaṭiyālē caṉṟātiṟta varai cella Āṇṭu
vayalaṟṟa maruvāti ṉayinār vāramumṅ kuṭuttu Āṇṭum Anupavittukkoḷḷa kaṭavārkaḷ Ākavu minṉilattukku
varum taram Eṟcōṟu Iṉiyōkam maṟṟum Eṟpeyaṟpaṭṭaṉavum caṟuvamāṉiya m Ākavu vēṇumeṉṟa tāṉātamaṉa
viṟkiṟaiyaṅkaḷukum Uritu Āka Āṇṭum Aṉupavittu Inta ṉilam Ākkuvaṉa Ākkiyum Uyaṟppaṉa Uyar
tiyum Āḷakkaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu kāṇiāṭci paṇṇikkuṭuttōm maṇavāḷaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭā
ṟku vallaṉāṭu nāṭāka camainta ṉāṭṭavarōm Ippaṭikku kiḷippayiṟṟūr ṉāṭu muṭikoṇṭa vēḷār Eḻuttu
kaḷaṅkuṭi kulōttuṅka veḷar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku valla nāṭu ṉāṭṭava coṟpaṭikku nāṭṭukkaṇakku kāṅkaiyar Eḻuttu
tāṉattār colppaṭikku kōyil kaṇakku Āvuṭaiyāṉ vallanāṭṭu vēḷān Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 34.318 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
